title: corybas unguiculatus
intro: Corybas unguiculatus, also known as the Yellow Pinesap or Yellow Bird's Tongue, is a species of orchid native to Australia and New Guinea, characterized by its yellow flowers and unique shape. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, boasting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits associated with Corybas unguiculatus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
